notes: Preserve discrepancy_found and return the case to the coordinator without marking codex_verified.

Correct the product-boundary review so Meatball Hero and Rigatoni Vodka are current unmatched products found on both official and Toast surfaces, not Toast-only products.
Keep cross-contact unknown unless explicit restaurant or linked-vendor shared-equipment language is obtained.
